entities.name: GRAIN SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop species being studied for charcoal rot incidence

entities.name: NITROGEN
entities.description: Nutrient levels applied to the main plots to study its effect on disease incidence

entities.name: PLANT DENSITY
entities.description: The population density of plants studied for its effect on disease incidence

entities.name: MOISTURE STRESS
entities.description: Soil moisture deficit created during grain filling using sprinkler irrigation

entities.name: MACROPHOMINA PHASEOLINA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen responsible for causing charcoal rot

entities.name: CHARCOAL ROT
entities.description: A disease in grain sorghum characterized by symptoms including lodging and root infection

entities.name: SPLIT-SPLIT-SPLIT FIELD PLOT DESIGN
entities.description: The experimental field layout used to test nitrogen, density, moisture, and inoculation

entities.name: LINE-SOURCE SPRINKLER IRRIGATION
entities.description: The technique used to create a gradient of soil moisture stress

entities.name: PLANT LODGING
entities.description: A symptom of charcoal rot used as a primary measure of disease incidence

entities.name: SOFT STALK
entities.description: A disease parameter of charcoal rot correlated with plant lodging

entities.name: NUMBER OF NODES CROSSED
entities.description: A disease parameter of charcoal rot correlated with plant lodging

entities.name: ROOT INFECTION
entities.description: A disease parameter of charcoal rot correlated with plant lodging

entities.name: PLANT SENESCENCE
entities.description: A disease parameter of charcoal rot correlated with plant lodging

entities.name: ARTIFICIAL INOCULATION
entities.description: The process of introducing Macrophomina phaseolina into the plants
